note: Skip→absent collapses with fail-fixed; CI matrix flip would report FixedFailures without verification
Severity field holds out-of-domain test outcome strings; round-trips into report.Severity contract
testKey uses '/' separator but pkg paths contain '/'; decode picks last '/' breaking subtest names
Legacy migration uses time.Now() for unknown-age samples; trend plots will mis-attribute timing
Run.Tests field added without SchemaVersion bump; downgrade loses test history silently
DiffSummary uses omitempty, Envelope force-emits via nonNil(); wire-shape divergence for same payload
Rename-based write replaces inode so upgraders DO get 0o600; the 'retained perms' claim is incorrect
No JSON roundtrip test for Run.Tests; nil-vs-empty-map and future shape changes uncovered
isTestFlaky relies on unwritten 'only failures in map' invariant entangled with F1 fix
Watch already debounces at 250ms; byte-identical no-op fast-path is exploratory, lower-tier per author
